prompt: Write an incident report about the production database outage that lasted two hours.
Draft a bug report for the checkout crash affecting all users at peak traffic.
Write an urgent warning to the team about the security breach we just detected.
Compose a short message of condolence to a colleague whose parent passed away.
Summarize the postmortem for the data-loss incident for leadership.
Write a notice informing the team about an upcoming round of layoffs.
Report the severity-1 outage to the on-call channel with current status.
Explain to a customer why their order failed and their data was lost.
